title: therofon occidentale
intro: Therofon occidentale, also known as Western or American Yarrow, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its fern-like foliage and white or pink flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Therofon occidentale include its effectiveness in reducing menstrual cramps, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Therofon occidentale include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, from skin irritations to menstrual disorders.
